innateAbility.name: Threads of Fate
innateAbility.description: Additionally applies a dormant debuff to enemy heroes whenever Weaver damages them.If Weaver remains within proximity distance of the debuff-affected enemy hero a certain time, the debuff becomes active and applies a movement speed slow.

abilities.name: The Swarm
abilities.description: Launches a swarm of Beetles, that latch on any enemy unit in their path, attacking and reducing the affected enemy units' armor until it is killed.

abilities.name: Shukuchi
abilities.description: Shifts out of visibility while reaching high movement speeds — doing harm once to all enemy units it passes through.

abilities.name: Geminate Attack
abilities.description: Allows Weaver to dispatch more than one attack at once.

abilities.name: Time Lapse
abilities.description: Weaver warps backward to whatever position it was in a few seconds earlier — regaining both health and mana values from that time.Neither affects current ability cooldowns nor gold and experience.
